_about: Shared base ESLint config for Next.js frontend apps. Today the rules block hoists web-storefront's pre-existing team rules (no-explicit-any, no-unused-vars, exhaustive-deps — all at warn) so every frontend gets the same lint discipline. The rules sit at warn deliberately: CI doesn't fail on them but devs see nags in their editor. Promote to error rule-by-rule as the codebase catches up. Leaves extend this file via .eslintrc.json with `extends: "@sportsmart/eslint-config/nextjs.json"` and stay otherwise empty — additions land here in one place.
